name: trmnl
description: DeepL-powered prompt translator. /trmnl for on-demand translation; >> prefix auto-translates via UserPromptSubmit hook.

apiKey.title: DeepL API key
apiKey.description: Your DeepL API key (free tier at deepl.com/your-account/keys). Stored securely in the system keychain. Alternatively run `trmnl --setup` in a terminal.

targetLang.title: Target language
targetLang.description: DeepL target code (zh, ja, de, fr, ...). Default zh.

autoPrefix.title: Auto-translate prefix
autoPrefix.description: Prompts starting with this string are auto-translated by the UserPromptSubmit hook. Empty string disables auto mode.

hookTimeoutMs.title: Hook timeout (ms)
hookTimeoutMs.description: Max time the auto-translate hook will wait for DeepL before passing the prompt through untranslated.

responseLang.title: Response language
responseLang.description: Language Claude should reply in. Input is translated for token savings; output stays in this language. Default English.
